query: Can you help me build a small Python CLI that reads a CSV file and outputs a GitHub-flavored markdown table? It needs to handle quoted commas and include a couple tests.
Our Node script that converts CSV to markdown breaks when a cell contains a pipe or an embedded newline. Can you fix the renderer and add a regression test?
I have a CSV export and want to turn it into a markdown table for a README, but I need to rename a few headers and skip one column.
Can you analyze this CSV and tell me which customers spent the most last quarter?
Please convert this markdown table into JSON.
Help me polish the markdown formatting in this README section about installation.
